[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000110010 4
1 0110101100 5
2 1100111011 7
3 1100110001 5
4 1000110010 4
5 1100011110 6
6 0100001001 3
7 1010011011 6

36 63 0001111110 6
47 74 1111001001 6
50 05 1110111011 8
61 16 0010101001 4
72 27 0101111101 7

15 51 1100111011 7 match 2
26 62 1100110001 5 match 3
37 73 1000110010 4 match 0 4
